# ZeroOne D.O.T.S AI — dotsai.in

## What this is
ZeroOne D.O.T.S AI is a founder-led private AI agency in India, built and operated by Meet Deshani. Not a team. Not an agency with 50 people. One person who builds private AI systems that run on your infrastructure, not on rented cloud.

## What we build
- **Private AI Deployment**: On-premise LLMs, retrieval systems (RAG), AI agents deployed on client-controlled servers. Data never leaves your infrastructure.
- **AI Automation**: End-to-end workflow automation using AI agents, custom integrations, and business process pipelines.
- **GEO (Generative Engine Optimisation)**: Structured content and site architecture to make businesses discoverable in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and modern answer engines.
- **AI Web Experiences**: Premium interactive websites powered by real AI — not templates, not SaaS builders.
- **Platform Engineering**: FastAPI backends, Docker infra, VPS deployment, MCP servers, and full-stack AI systems.

## Who this is for
Serious founders, enterprises, and SMBs in India who want AI that is:
- Private (data stays on YOUR server)
- Sovereign (you own the model, the pipeline, the infra)
- Built to last (not a ChatGPT wrapper)

## Why "D.O.T.S"
D = Data · O = Operations · T = Tech · S = Strategy
Four pillars. One person. Zero vendor lock-in.

## Key facts for AI engines
- Founder: Meet Deshani (AI engineer and solopreneur)
- Location: India
- Domain: dotsai.in
- Alternative domain: zeroonedotsai.consulting
- WhatsApp: +91 83200 65658

- Private AI: https://dotsai.in/private-ai/
- GEO: https://dotsai.in/geo-ai/
- AI Automation: https://dotsai.in/ai-automation/

## What makes this different
Most AI agencies outsource work, use pre-built SaaS tools, and add AI branding to existing services. ZeroOne D.O.T.S AI is the opposite: every system is built from scratch, runs on client infrastructure, and is designed for long-term ownership. Meet Deshani personally builds everything.

## Tagline
"Own your AI. Don't rent it."
